ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gymnasts" (
  "gymnast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gymnast */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the gymnast */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the gymnast */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the gymnast */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the gymnast in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the gymnast in kilograms */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach associated with the gymnast */,
  "gymnast_type" TEXT /* Type of gymnast (male/female) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the gymnast has been competing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gymnast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gymnasts_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition */,
  "team_event" INTEGER /* Whether the competition includes team events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the event belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "apparatus" TEXT /* Apparatus used in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "team_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team event (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_apparatus FOREIGN KEY ("apparatus") REFERENCES apparatus ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "gymnast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gymnast */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty score */,
  "execution" REAL /* Execution score */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the event */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score */,
  "score_status" TEXT /* Status of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_gymnast_id FOREIGN KEY ("gymnast_id") REFERENCES gymnasts ("gymnast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overall_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "gymnast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gymnast */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank in the competition */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_rankings_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_rankings_gymnast_id FOREIGN KEY ("gymnast_id") REFERENCES gymnasts ("gymnast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparatus" (
  "apparatus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparatus */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the apparatus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the apparatus */,
  "apparatus_type" TEXT /* Type of apparatus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apparatus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of judging experience */,
  "judge_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_judges" (
  "event_judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-judge assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "judge_role" TEXT /* Role of the judge in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_judges_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_judges_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (in JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "gymnast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gymnast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_gymnast_id FOREIGN KEY ("gymnast_id") REFERENCES gymnasts ("gymnast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up */,
  "third_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-place finisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "event_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up */,
  "third_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-place finisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gymnast_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "gymnast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gymnast */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the gymnast */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the gymnast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gymnast_progress_gymnast_id FOREIGN KEY ("gymnast_id") REFERENCES gymnasts ("gymnast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gymnast_progress_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)
